method: Local statistical weighting: item flat stats (normalized) × role priority vector + passive/active utility tags + cost band + item patch momentum; per-god paths re-scored by kit STR/INT scaling from ability metrics. No external build sites.

template.description: Conquest duo ADC: sustained basic-attack DPS, crit windows, penetration, and self-heal to stay in lane/fights.

starter.name: Gilded Arrow
starter.effect:
Every 10s: Mark the highest Health enemy minion or jungle monster within 12.8m.
*If you land the killing blow:
**+3 Bonus Gold
**+15% Attack Speed for 8s
**+30 Mana
Requires Level

starter_alternatives.name: Death's Toll
starter_alternatives.effect:
Adaptive Stat: +15 Strength or +25 Intelligence (based on highest item stat).
Attack Hit:
*+2 (+0.3% Max Health) Heal
*+1 (+0.1% Max Mana) Restore
Requires Level 20 to upgrade.

starter_alternatives.name: Leather Cowl
starter_alternatives.effect:
Adaptive Stat: +15 Strength or +25 Intelligence (based on highest item stat).
Within 8.8m of a God: +15% Attack Speed and +2.5% Movement Speed.
Alone: +5% Movement Speed and +7.5%

starter_alternatives.name: Selflessness
starter_alternatives.effect:
Ally god within 8.8m is hit by Hard CC:
*Shield them for 25+5% of your Max Health
*Cooldown: 20s
Requires Level 20 to upgrade

upgraded_starter.name: Sharpshooter's Arrow
upgraded_starter.effect:
+5% Gold Gain from Kills and Assists
Increased Attack Damage against enemy Gods farther away, capping at +10% at 6m.
Requires Level 20.

core_items.name: Lernaean Bow
core_items.effect:
